title: Morning Dew
description: Drink a glass of water immediately upon waking.

title: Sun Catch
description: 10 minutes of afternoon sunlight — no early alarms needed.

title: Remember Cramble
description: Remember Cramble once today — just one tiny happy thought.

title: Iron Armor
description: Eat one protein or iron-rich snack.

title: Flower Breath
description: Take 5 slow breaths and relax your shoulders.

title: Tiny Stretch
description: Two minutes of gentle stretching.

title: Peace Note
description: Write one kind sentence about today.

title: April Duet
description: Play one soft song, hum for a minute, or let a tiny spring tune exist.

title: Citrus Sidekick
description: Add one vitamin-C friend to an iron meal: lemon, amla, orange, guava, or tomatoes.

title: Sunlit Selfie
description: Step into daylight and take or send one cute photo.

title: Pretty Plate
description: Add one colorful thing to food: fruit, salad, lemon, or tomatoes.

title: Bottle Bloom
description: Refill your bottle once before evening.

title: Slow Sip Rule
description: Finish one bottle slowly before evening.

title: Tea Pause
description: Keep tea or coffee away from your iron snack for about an hour.

title: Cramble Ping
description: Send or think one sweet line for Cramble.

title: Stretch Like a Cat
description: Do 60 seconds of stretching after waking or before bed.

title: Sunny Plate
description: Add one vitamin-D friendly food today: egg yolk, fish, paneer, or fortified milk.

title: Body Battery Check
description: Rate energy 1-5 once today. No judgment.

title: Hair Hydration Check
description: Drink water before or after hair wash.

title: Landing Lights
description: After midnight, switch to dim lights and one calm app/show instead of endless scrolling.

title: Silk/Satin Sleep
description: Use a soft pillowcase or tie hair loosely before sleep.

title: Moon Wash
description: Before bed, brush teeth and wash face.

title: Protein Plate for Hair
description: Have one protein-rich meal or snack, already aligned with iron.

title: Protein Plus
description: Add one small protein bite: nuts, chana, egg, paneer, curd, chicken, or tofu.

title: Energy Check
description: Notice your energy once today: low, okay, or glowing. No judgment.

title: Spring Canelé
description: Have one small treat slowly, without turning it into a snack spiral.

title: One Real Meal
description: Eat one proper meal without rushing.

title: Snack Shield
description: Keep one better snack nearby before cravings hit.

title: Hair Oiling Ritual
description: Light oil or scalp massage once this week.

title: Badminton Boss
description: Play a game with friends.

title: Dark Mode Protocol
description: Dim the lights and use blue-light filters after midnight.

title: Sunny Walk
description: Take a relaxed walk outside.

title: Protein Prep
description: Prepare one easy protein option for the week.

title: Snack Shelf
description: Keep one easy iron/protein snack ready for the week.

title: Doctor Note
description: Write one question for the doctor about iron, vitamin D, or supplements.

title: Sun Date
description: Plan one relaxed daylight outing this week — balcony, walk, cafe, or park.

title: Sleep Nest
description: Make the room sleep-friendly once this week: dim, cool, and phone a little away.

title: Meal of Honor
description: Have one proper iron-rich meal this week without rushing.
